title: Right-side chat panel component with session handling
purpose: Displays the agent chat interface in a right-side panel, showing either a session selection message or the chat interface based on current session state.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ChatPanel that accepts className and onAutoSwitch props, uses session store to determine current session state, and conditionally renders either a session selection message or the AgentChat component.

steps.content: Extract the current session from the session store.
Render a container div with appropriate styling and class names.
Display the migration banner component at the top.
IF no current session exists, show a message prompting the user to select a session.
ELSE render the AgentChat component with the current session ID.
